## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include architectural updates, performance optimization details, or accessibility improvements.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Performance / Code Hygiene (internal structural optimizations, re-render fixes)
- [ ] Documentation / Rules config updates

## Verification & Testing
Describe the verification steps you ran to ensure no regressions:
- Run `npm run build`: [ ] Pass [ ] Fail
- Run `npx tsc --noEmit`: [ ] Pass [ ] Fail
- Confirm zero visual layout shifts or glow additions: [ ] Yes
